pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh scripts confirm this exact output file path is required.
Task description explicitly states 'set dimensions to 200 mm wide'.
Task description explicitly states 'and 350 mm tall'.
Task description explicitly states 'setting it to exactly 80 mm' from the top edge.
Task description explicitly states 'setting it to exactly 130 mm' between tweeter and woofer centers.
Task description explicitly states 'tweeter cutout (upper circle) with a diameter of 75 mm'.
Task description explicitly states 'woofer cutout (lower circle) with a diameter of 145 mm'.
verifier.py checks for 'abs(p - target) <= tolerance' where tolerance defaults to 0.5.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 2D layout from an empty canvas without any pre-existing real-world data files. All geometric constraints, including the expected output path (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/speaker_baffle.slvs), expected dimensions (200x350), expected cutout diameters (75 and 145), and vertical spacing (80 and 130), directly correspond to the explicit synthetic parameters outlined in the task description and verifier logic.
